creator: kubito@gmail.com
text:
Matthias Andree <matthias.andree@gmx.de> writes:

> the port currently doesn't build, it fails because the output directory
> $WRKSRC/src/xmlpatterns/.rcc and
> $WRKSRC/src/xmlpatterns/.rcc/release-shared
> are missing, and $WRKSRC/bin/rcc cannot generate files there.

Hmm, is it qt 4.7.3? Can you paste the part of the build log that shows
this error? Any weird compiler configuration?

This port built fine in all our test machines [1], so this sounds weird.

[1] http://kde.ixsystems.com/index.php?action=describe_port&id=954
